user_message: Karen Patel at VanArsdel Ltd just sent this. Help me draft a response.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: escalation triage Discussion - VanArsdel Ltd
Date: 2024-01-12
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), David (VanArsdel Ltd)

[00:02:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on escalation triage from our last session.

[00:07:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:12:00] David (VanArsdel Ltd): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.

[00:16:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.

[00:18:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:20:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:25:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.

[00:30:00] David (VanArsdel Ltd): On the escalation triage front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.
